headlines.story:
The Cowboys clinched the NFC East on Sunday with a 27–17 win over the Patriots — their first division title since 2023.

Quarterback play carried the day, ESPN's sources said, as Dallas leaned on a ground game that churned out 180 yards.

“We earned this,” the head coach told reporters, pointing to a defense that forced three turnovers.

Next up: a home playoff game the following week against a wild-card opponent still to be decided.
